title: Half-Life Crowbar Mace
description:
Run. Think. Mace*. Live,

*with a crowbar.
body:
# Run. Think. Mace. Live, albeit with a crowbar..

This simple resource pack changes the Mace item into a crowbar that packs with features including: 

- A new, custom texture that fits with the vanilla items, based on the original Half-Life crowbar.
- Imported sounds from the original 1998 Half-Life.
- Renaming into "Crowbar" in all English languages (and some other interesting languages too.. :eyes:)

![Exterior view of the crowbar (map created by 2305kami)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ftqXzXtX/images/0921c27e553e07e6c73ef4b4221d9ddf12e36d1f.webp)
